name: Piclozotan
description: Piclozotan has been investigated for the treatment of Parkinson's Disease.

interactions.name: Cabergoline
interactions.description: Cabergoline may increase the vasoconstricting activities of Piclozotan.

interactions.name: Bromocriptine
interactions.description: Bromocriptine may increase the vasoconstricting activities of Piclozotan.

interactions.description: Methylergometrine may increase the vasoconstricting activities of Piclozotan.

interactions.description: Dihydroergotamine may increase the vasoconstricting activities of Piclozotan.

interactions.description: Ergotamine may increase the vasoconstricting activities of Piclozotan.

interactions.name: Ergoloid mesylate
interactions.description: Ergoloid mesylate may increase the vasoconstricting activities of Piclozotan.

interactions.name: Ergonovine
interactions.description: Ergonovine may increase the vasoconstricting activities of Piclozotan.

interactions.name: Tranylcypromine
interactions.description: The metabolism of Piclozotan can be decreased when combined with Tranylcypromine.
